title: Zenodo metadata adapter + DOI provenance for self-hosted cards
context: The self-serve acceptance fallback used in the pilot (pilot-009) and potentially in other tasks relies on publishing a card as a Zenodo record to obtain a citable DOI. Currently this is done manually. A Zenodo metadata adapter that projects from the canonical schema would automate the metadata preparation step, making the self-serve path faster and more consistent. This is a backlog task powering the fallback acceptance channel.
objective: Build and ship a Zenodo metadata adapter that projects canonical model-card objects into Zenodo deposit metadata JSON, enabling automated preparation of Zenodo record submissions for self-hosted model cards with citable DOIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter projects canonical model-card JSON into valid Zenodo deposit metadata JSON, including title, description, creators, keywords, license, and the resource_type appropriate for model documentation.
DOI provenance is recorded: the adapter captures the Zenodo DOI (if already assigned) and writes it back to the card's provenance field.
Committed golden canonical-to-Zenodo-metadata fixture is diffed in CI; output is validated against the Zenodo deposit API schema.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; no credentials, tokens, or patient data in any committed file.
resources: PLAN.md — Cold-start de-risking (Zenodo self-serve fallback), Dependencies & integrations
Zenodo REST API documentation; Zenodo deposit metadata schema
output: A merged PR adding a Zenodo deposit metadata adapter with a golden fixture and CI integration.
